name: Rum Cake
recipeIngredient: 18 1/2 oz Yellow cake mix, no pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-cup bundt pan.
3. Sprinkle chopped pecans in the bottom of the pan.
4. Pour batter made from water, cake mix, pudding, eggs, oil, and rum over the nuts.
5. Bake for 1 hour or until done by toothpick test.
6. Cool and invert the cake onto a rack.
GLAZE:
1. Melt butter and stir with water, sugar, and dark bacardi rum over low flame for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
2. Make holes in the top of the cooled cake using an ice pick.
3. Drizzle glaze evenly until fully absorbed.
4. Let the cake sit before serving with espresso or another after-dinner liqueur.
5. Enjoy; this cake is best served the next day and will be very moist inside.
